title: Deliciously Roasted Venezuelan Seed Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious meal prep dish featuring roasted seeds, candy, and raw friendly ingredients, inspired by Venezuelan cuisine. This dish is perfect for a healthy and satisfying snack or dessert.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the pumpkin seeds, sunflower seeds, and chia seeds.
Spread the seed mixture on a baking sheet and roast for 10 minutes.
Remove the seeds from the oven and let them cool completely.
In a small bowl, mix together the coconut flakes, candy pieces, and salt.
Add the honey and vanilla extract to the coconut flake mixture and stir until well combined.
Once the seeds have cooled, add them to the coconut flake mixture and stir until well combined.
Spoon the seed mixture into individual bowls and serve.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.
